package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for time_since_candidate_via_now_sub: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `time.Now().Sub(start)` instead of `time.Since(start)`.
type CaseTimeSinceCandidateViaNowSubDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseTimeSinceCandidateViaNowSubModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseTimeSinceCandidateViaNowSubRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseTimeSinceCandidateViaNowSubModel
}

type CaseTimeSinceCandidateViaNowSubService struct {
    repo *CaseTimeSinceCandidateViaNowSubRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseTimeSinceCandidateViaNowSubAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeTimeSinceCandidateViaNowSub(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseTimeSinceCandidateViaNowSubDTO) error {
    focus := "time_since_candidate_via_now"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    time_since_candidate_now_sub_negative := map[string]int{"time": 1, "since": 2, "candidate": 3, "now": 4, "sub": 5}
    time_since_candidate_now_sub_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    time_negative_0 := time_since_candidate_now_sub_negative["time"] + len(input)
    _ = time_negative_0
    since_negative_1 := time_since_candidate_now_sub_negative["since"] + len(input)
    _ = since_negative_1
    candidate_negative_2 := time_since_candidate_now_sub_negative["candidate"] + len(input)
    _ = candidate_negative_2
    now_negative_3 := time_since_candidate_now_sub_negative["now"] + len(input)
    _ = now_negative_3
    sub_negative_4 := time_since_candidate_now_sub_negative["sub"] + len(input)
    _ = sub_negative_4
    return nil
}
